creator: ahferroin7@gmail.com
text:
Using a Virtualbox VM with certain combinations of storage controllers, attempts to boot the LiveCD for installation fail withe the message:
    Mounting from cd9660:/dev/iso9660/FREEBSD_INSTALL failed with error 19.
I originally discovered this with VirtualBox 4.1 using a Debian GNU/Linux system with a version 3.2 Linux kernel as the host OS, since then I have successfully reproduced it with VirtualBox 4.1 on Windows and Mac OS X as well.

How-To-Repeat: Using VirtualBox 4.1 create a VM with both an IDE controller and either a SCSI, SATA, or SAS controller. Put at least 1 IDE hard disk, at Least 1 IDE CD drive, and at least 1 hard disk attached to the other controller.  Enable IO APIC in the VM, and set the chipset to ICH9.  Then start the VM with any of the FreeBSD 9.0 amd64 iso images in the cd drive.
